title: FileMetadata
description: Metadata for a file stored in Nhost Storage, including identity, size, type, and bucket association.

name.description: Original file name as provided at upload time.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the file content.

etag.description: ETag hash of the file content for cache validation.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file was created in storage.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file metadata was last updated.

isUploaded.description: Whether the file upload has been completed successfully.

bucketId.description: Identifier of the bucket containing this file.

uploadedByUserId.description: ID of the user who uploaded this file.
